---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea to improve CALCORA
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## 💡 Is Your Feature Request Related to a Problem?
Describe the problem. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## 🎯 Describe the Solution You'd Like
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## 📋 Describe Alternatives You've Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 🎨 Visual Design (Optional)
Add mockups, wireframes, or screenshots of how the feature might look.

## ⚙️ Implementation Details
Describe how you think this feature should be implemented, if you have ideas.

## 📊 Priority
- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Should have
- [ ] Must have
- [ ] Critical

## 🔗 Related Issues
Link to related issues if any: #

## 👥 Who Benefits?
Describe who would benefit from this feature and why.

---

**Thank you for the feature request!** We'll review it and discuss implementation.
